ValidationRule.description: Used when Account is Rejected by MDM
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
/* Existing V. Rule AND( NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8020_Bypass_Opp_V_RULE) ,NOT( ISBLANK( AccountId ) ) , Account.MDM_Status__c ='Rejected' )
*/ AND( NOT( $Permission.C_PERM_2100_Bypass_Account_V_RULE ), NOT($Profile.Name = "PROFILE: PKI Project Farma") ,OR ( Account.MDM_Status__c='Rejected' ,AND( NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8020_Bypass_Opp_V_RULE) ,fxRecordTypeDevName__c <> 'Informatics' ,Account.fxSetMergeFlag__c=False ,DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)>=DATE(2022,04,28)/*Deployment Date*/ ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_067:Please choose a different account. This account type can't be used with opportunities.
